top3.sql:
SELECT strftime('%Y', Date) AS year, SUM(Amount * Price) AS total_cost_eur
FROM transactions_1k
GROUP BY year
ORDER BY total_cost_eur DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT strftime('%Y', Date) AS year, SUM(Amount * Price) AS total_gas_cost_eur
FROM transactions_1k
WHERE ProductID IN (
    SELECT ProductID 
    FROM products 
    WHERE Description LIKE '%gas%'
)
GROUP BY year
ORDER BY total_gas_cost_eur DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH gas_transactions AS (
    SELECT t.Date, t.Amount, t.Price
    FROM transactions_1k t
    JOIN products p ON t.ProductID = p.ProductID
    WHERE p.Description LIKE '%gas%'
),
eur_transactions AS (
    SELECT gt.Date, gt.Amount, gt.Price
    FROM gas_transactions gt
    JOIN customers c ON EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM transactions_1k t2 
        WHERE t2.Date = gt.Date 
          AND t2.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
          AND c.Currency = 'EUR'
    )
)
SELECT strftime('%Y', Date) AS year, ...

SELECT strftime('%Y', Date) AS year, SUM(Amount * Price) AS total_cost_eur
FROM transactions_1k
GROUP BY year
ORDER BY total_cost_eur DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT strftime('%Y', Date) AS year, SUM(Amount * Price) AS total_gas_cost_eur
FROM transactions_1k
WHERE ProductID IN (
    SELECT ProductID 
    FROM products 
    WHERE Description LIKE '%gas%'
)
GROUP BY year
ORDER BY total_gas_cost_eur DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH yearly_gas_cost AS (
    SELECT 
        strftime('%Y', Date) AS year,
        SUM(Amount * Price) AS total_cost
    FROM transactions_1k t
    JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
    GROUP BY year
)
SELECT year
FROM yearly_gas_cost
ORDER BY total_cost DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH gas_transactions AS (
    SELECT t.Date, t.Amount, t.Price
    FROM transactions_1k t
    JOIN products p ON t.ProductID = p.ProductID
    WHERE p.Description LIKE '%gas%'
),
eur_transactions AS (
    SELECT gt.Date, gt.Amount, gt.Price
    FROM gas_transactions gt
    JOIN customers c ON EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM transactions_1k t2 
        WHERE t2.Date = gt.Date 
          AND t2.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
          AND c.Currency = 'EUR'
    )
)
SELECT strftime('%Y', Date) AS year, ...

WITH eur_gas_transactions AS (
    SELECT t.Date, t.Amount, t.Price
    FROM transactions_1k t
    JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
      AND EXISTS (
          SELECT 1 FROM products p 
          WHERE p.ProductID = t.ProductID 
            AND p.Description LIKE '%gas%'
      )
)
SELECT strftime('%Y', Date) AS year, SUM(Amount * Price) AS total_gas_cost
FROM eur_gas_transactions
GROUP BY year
ORDER BY total_gas_cost DESC
LIMIT 1;

final.sql:
WITH yearly_gas_cost AS (
    SELECT 
        strftime('%Y', Date) AS year,
        SUM(Amount * Price) AS total_cost
    FROM transactions_1k t
    JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
    GROUP BY year
)
SELECT year
FROM yearly_gas_cost
ORDER BY total_cost DESC
LIMIT 1;
